task_completion.description: Agent inspects the Navon Figures dataset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output (e.g., head, cat), a text editor, or a data analysis script showing the contents or loading of ~/pebl/data/navon_data.csv.

task_completion.description: Agent identifies and excludes the participant with below 60% accuracy on 'local' blocks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Script logic, terminal output, or data filtering steps explicitly showing the exclusion of participant 'sub-99' due to low accuracy on local blocks.

task_completion.description: Agent calculates Global Advantage, Global Interference, and Local Interference.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code (e.g., Python/pandas) or terminal output showing the formulas or computation of the three required metrics using only correct trials.

task_completion.description: Agent exports the analysis results to a JSON file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named navon_report.json in ~/pebl/analysis/ (visible via ls, file explorer, or text editor) containing a 'participants' list and a 'group_means' object.

task_completion.description: Agent generates and saves an interaction bar chart of the condition group mean RTs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named navon_interaction_plot.png in ~/pebl/analysis/ is created, and/or an image viewer/plot window shows a bar chart displaying the four condition group mean RTs.

integrity.description: Agent used a script or data analysis tool to process the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of a Python, R, or shell script performing pandas/dataframe operations, rather than the agent manually typing out the JSON report.

integrity.description: Agent generated the plot using code.
integrity.visual_evidence: Script contains plotting code (e.g., matplotlib, seaborn, ggplot2) that corresponds to the saved navon_interaction_plot.png file.

integrity.description: Agent calculated the accuracy to determine the excluded participant.
integrity.visual_evidence: The code calculates accuracy per participant for 'local' blocks rather than hardcoding 'sub-99' without prior computation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The contaminated participant that must be excluded is 'sub-99'. The expected output files are exactly '/home/ga/pebl/analysis/navon_report.json' and '/home/ga/pebl/analysis/navon_interaction_plot.png'.
